api_key.description: Airtable Personal Access Token, sent as a Bearer token. Preferred over access_token when both are set. Never logged.

access_token.description: Airtable OAuth2 access token, sent as a Bearer token when api_key is unset. Never logged.

base_url.description: Airtable API base URL override for tests or proxies.

base_id.description: Airtable base id (required for the 'tables' and 'records' streams).

table_id.description: Airtable table id or name (required for the 'records' stream).

page_size.description: Records per page for the 'records' stream (1-100).
